Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

partyscape 0.1.0

First release. Implements the three analytical tools from the accompanying paper:

  • Diversity profiles via diversity_profile() / evenness_profile() / hill_number().
  • Profile crossings via crossings() (both linear-interpolation and sign-change detectors).
  • Multiplicative beta diversity via alpha_beta_gamma() / collapse_to_elections().

Also:

  • Scalar summaries: hhi(), rae(), enp() (alias effective_parties()), dominance_gap(), top_two().
  • Null model: taagepera_allik_shares().
  • ParlGov accessors: fetch_parlgov(), parlgov_seat_shares().
  • autoplot() / plot() / print() methods for each S3 class.

Developed by Marcel Neunhoeffer.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
